name: Manual Payment

[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Manual Payments","bold":true},{"text":" page allows you to manage payment methods that are completed "},{"text":"outside of automated payment gateways","bold":true},{"text":", such as bank transfers, cash on delivery, or other offline payment arrangements. Orders placed using manual payment methods require review and approval before they can be fulfilled."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This page serves as a central location to view, create, and manage all manual payment methods configured for a specific sales channel."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"
